description: A Commercial Construction project for a three-story office building is open in ProjectLibre. The project schedule was recently re-imported from a corrupted backup file and contains multiple dependency errors across different phases, such as incorrect predecessors, wrong dependency types, and missing or illogical links. Review and correct the task dependency logic throughout the project to ensure the schedule reflects realistic commercial construction practice. Save the corrected project to /home/ga/Documents/construction_project.pod.

injected_errors.task_name: Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors
injected_errors.error: Predecessor changed from UID=44 (Strip column piers) to UID=43 (Strip wall forms). Steel erection depends on foundation work, not elevator wall stripping.
Link type for predecessor UID=55 changed from FS(1) to SF(3). Start-to-Finish is physically impossible for forming-to-pouring.
Predecessor UID=88 (Install flashing at parapet walls) removed. Flashing must be installed before roof fill.
Spurious predecessor UID=109 (Pave parking lot) added. Paving has no relation to elevator installation.
